name: Lightning's Swift Strike
summary: A full-attack, hit-fast spirit that punishes Invaders the turn they land.

aspects.name: Pandemonium
aspects.delta: Replaces the Thundering Destruction innate with one that adds Fear alongside its damage.

aspects.name: Wind
aspects.delta: Replaces Swiftness of Lightning; its innate hastens and empowers another Spirit's Powers instead.

aspects.name: Immense
aspects.delta: Your top Presence track pays double Energy, but Power Cards cost 2 Card Plays; unused plays convert to Elements.

aspects.name: Sparking
aspects.delta: Replaces Thundering Destruction; its innate lets any target Spirit damage Invaders, gain a Minor Power, or play a card. (Card 2 of 2 is not on the wiki.)

notes: Strong from turn one; less impactful late-game.

name: River Surges in Sunlight
summary: Synergizes with Dahan to repel and push back Invaders before they can build up.

aspects.name: Sunshine
aspects.delta: Its innate feeds another Spirit Energy (and you gain some too), and can remove Blight.

aspects.name: Travel
aspects.delta: Replaces River's Domain; moves Dahan along your Presence and turns 4-Dahan lands into Sacred Sites with Defend 1.

aspects.name: Haven
aspects.delta: Replaces Massive Flooding with an innate that Defends, gathers Dahan and removes Invader Health.

name: Vital Strength of the Earth
summary: Ramps up slowly with few early Powers, but grows into a durable defensive powerhouse.

aspects.name: Resilience
aspects.delta: Lands with your Sacred Site take 8 additional Damage before any Blight is added.

aspects.name: Might
aspects.delta: Its innate grants an extra Power Card play, +1 Damage on damage-dealing Powers, and a Power Card.

aspects.name: Nourishing
aspects.delta: Gain a Minor Power after each Major; its innate gathers Dahan and gives them +2 Health.

name: Shadows Flicker Like Flame
summary: Generates heavy Fear at relatively low damage, especially effective against Explorers.

aspects.name: Madness
aspects.delta: Adding Presence during Growth can also add Fear; Presence destroyed near Invaders generates Fear.

aspects.name: Reach
aspects.delta: Once per turn you may ignore Range.

aspects.name: Amorphous
aspects.delta: Move 1 Presence during each Fast phase and each Slow phase.

aspects.name: Foreboding
aspects.delta: Its innate lets your other Powers ignore Range there, and turns Fear generated in the land into Pushes.

aspects.name: Dark Fire
aspects.delta: Treat Moon as Fire and vice versa; the first Action each turn that would destroy your Presence Pushes it instead.

notes: Best against low-terror-track adversaries early on.

name: Thunderspeaker
summary: Leans on a large Dahan army for damage and control, alternating War and Growth turns.

aspects.name: Tactician
aspects.delta: Replaces the third Growth option with a flexible choice: a Power Card, Presence, Energy, or Sun/Fire.

aspects.name: Warrior
aspects.delta: Dahan moved by your Actions deal Damage, and its innate damages per Dahan present.

name: A Spread of Rampant Green
summary: Grows fast and hits Towns hard while also holding the line as a solid all-around defender.

aspects.name: Regrowth
aspects.delta: Replaces Steady Regenerations and All-Enveloping Green with an innate that adds Presence, even to adjacent lands.

aspects.name: Tangles
aspects.delta: Replaces Creepers Tear Into Mortar; its innate Pushes Dahan, Isolates the land and Downgrades a City. (Card 2 of 2 is not on the wiki.)

startingCards: Stem the Flow of Fresh Water

name: Ocean's Hungry Grasp
summary: A powerful coastal attacker that devastates Towns and Cities but struggles far inland.

aspects.name: Deeps
aspects.delta: Adds Ocean tokens to Coastal lands on any board; they damage Towns and Cities and can drown a land into the Ocean permanently.

name: Bringer of Dreams and Nightmares
summary: Transforms damage into Fear and plays entirely on the terror level track.

aspects.name: Enticing
aspects.delta: Its innate makes Invaders and Dahan deal 1 less Damage in the target land, and gathers them in.

aspects.name: Violence
aspects.delta: Bottom-track Card Plays double for Damage/Destroy Powers, and Fear scales with what they hit. Makes the game simpler for everyone else.

name: Sharp Fangs Behind the Leaves
summary: Relies on Beast tokens to strike and generate Fear, but weakens as Blight piles up.

aspects.name: Encircle
aspects.delta: Your Powers get +1 when targeting lands with Beasts; its innate gathers Beasts and deals Damage.

aspects.name: Unconstrained
aspects.delta: Ranging Hunt may target Blighted lands, and Beasts can be prepared each Spirit phase.

name: Keeper of the Forbidden Wilds
summary: Uses Wilds tokens to choke Explorer progress while still hitting decently hard.

aspects.name: Spreading Hostility
aspects.delta: Sacred Sites also count as Wilds, top-track Energy is halved, and the last Growth option becomes Fire, move Presence and Damage.

name: Heart of the Wildfire
summary: An aggressive spirit that feeds on Blight to grow stronger over time.

aspects.name: Transforming
aspects.delta: Destroying a Town or City instead Downgrades and Pushes it; its innate helps another Spirit swap Blight and cards.

name: Serpent Slumbering Beneath the Island
summary: Starts glacially slow but becomes an unstoppable, versatile force late-game.

aspects.name: Locus
aspects.delta: An Incarna that other Spirits can target through, and that repeats their land-targeting Power Cards.

notes: Very weak opening; needs a patient player and a forgiving early game.

name: Stone's Unyielding Defiance
summary: Builds Badlands tokens to fortify mountain lands and shrug off Blight effects.
startingCards: Jagged Shards Push from the Earth

name: Shifting Memory of Ages
summary: A defensive, Power-hoarding spirit that accumulates elemental tokens and Major Powers over time.

aspects.name: Intensify
aspects.delta: Spend Element Markers to modify your Actions: extra Damage, Defend, movement, or a Minor Power.

aspects.name: Mentor
aspects.delta: Draw fewer Power Cards but keep more; its innate hands cards to another Spirit and lets them play or repeat them.

name: Grinning Trickster Stirs Up Trouble
summary: Spreads Strife and Beast tokens, thriving on the randomness of Minor Powers.

name: Lure of the Deep Wilderness
summary: Piles Beast, Disease, Wilds, and Badlands tokens to strangle Explorer progress inland.

aspects.name: Lair
aspects.delta: An Incarna Lair where Invaders and Dahan cannot move, and large Invader stacks do not Ravage.

name: Many Minds Move as One
summary: A strong all-around defender that leans on heavy Beast tokens and generates real Fear.
startingCards: A Dreadful Tide of Scurrying Flesh
Guide the Way on Feathered Wings

name: Volcano Looming High
summary: Builds heavy Presence in mountain lands, then destroys it to erupt for damage and Fear — at the risk of spreading Blight.
notes: Complexity confirmed Moderate against the Spirit Island wiki (the cell was blank on the owner's reference sheet).

name: Shroud of Silent Mist
summary: Places Presence broadly to strain Invaders and prevent their healing.

aspects.name: Stranded
aspects.delta: Push your Presence twice each Fast and Slow phase, and Isolate one of your lands each Fast phase.

startingCards: Flowing and Silent Forms Dart By

name: Vengeance as a Burning Plague
summary: Exploits Disease and Badlands to punish Towns and Cities as Blight accumulates.

name: Starlight Seeks Its Form
summary: A sandbox spirit with an extremely open-ended, build-your-own-Powers playstyle.
notes: Not recommended for newcomers; very high setup and decision overhead.
startingCards: Gather the Scattered Light of Stars

name: Fractured Days Split the Sky
summary: Plays a careful long game around a shared Powers-and-Presence track with very few Presence tokens.
notes: Blight-sensitive due to a low Presence count.

name: Downpour Drenches the World
summary: An anti-Blight defensive spirit that can repeat the same Power multiple times per turn.
startingCards: Dark Skies Loose a Stinging Rain

name: Finder of Paths Unseen
summary: Wins through positioning, isolating lands and shuffling Invaders, Dahan, and tokens around the board.

name: Hearth-Vigil
summary: Boosts and protects a growing Dahan population across the board.

name: Towering Roots of the Jungle
summary: Guards its lands with Vitality tokens that soak up Blight, growing an Incarna that anchors the defense.
notes: Vitality tokens confirmed against the wiki (each prevents 1 Blight, then is removed).
startingCards: Blooming of the Rocks and Trees

name: Ember-Eyed Behemoth
summary: Stomps the island as a highly mobile Incarna, flattening whatever it reaches with raw damage.
notes: Uses no Wilds tokens — the reference sheet's "[Wilds?]" reading was wrong. Its mechanic is Incarna mobility (wiki-verified).

name: Relentless Gaze of the Sun
summary: An aggressive spirit that punishes lands already thick with Presence.

name: Wandering Voice Keens Delirium
summary: A mobile, Strife-spreading Incarnate spirit that darts around the board.

name: Wounded Waters Bleeding
summary: Moves Beast tokens and itself around the board to control where the fight happens.

name: Breath of Darkness Down Your Spine
summary: Captures Invaders into an Endless Dark zone, especially strong against Explorers.
startingCards: Emerge from the Dread Night Wind

name: Dances Up Earthquakes
summary: A slow-building, anticipation-based spirit that detonates delayed Quake-token effects.
notes: Quake tokens confirmed against the wiki.

name: Devouring Teeth Lurk Underfoot
summary: Wants to share lands with Invaders, punishing them with cheap short-range Powers and a permanent damage boost.
notes: OCFDU are estimates. No numeric ratings exist on the wiki or the owner's reference sheet; verify against the physical Horizons panel.
startingCards: Mark Territory with Scars and Teeth

name: Eyes Watch From the Trees
summary: Sees Invader plans coming and redirects or punishes them before they land.
notes: OCFDU are estimates. No numeric ratings exist on the wiki or the owner's reference sheet; verify against the physical Horizons panel.

name: Fathomless Mud of the Swamp
summary: A slow, defensive spirit that mires Invaders in place, spreading a defensive mud across the island.
notes: OCFDU are estimates. No numeric ratings exist on the wiki or the owner's reference sheet; verify against the physical Horizons panel.

name: Rising Heat of Stone and Sand
summary: A straightforward offensive spirit that bakes lands with heat, dealing steady damage.
notes: OCFDU are estimates. No numeric ratings exist on the wiki or the owner's reference sheet; verify against the physical Horizons panel. Elements wiki-confirmed.

name: Sun-Bright Whirlwind
summary: A highly mobile spirit that pushes and repositions Invaders rather than destroying them outright.
notes: OCFDU are estimates. No numeric ratings exist on the wiki or the owner's reference sheet; verify against the physical Horizons panel. Elements wiki-confirmed.
